_comment: SOC Master Widget registry. Copy to soc_master_apps.json and register YOUR apps. 'dir' = working dir (relative to this file or absolute). 'cmd' = argv array ('cmd_linux' overrides on Linux). 'console' true = own console window. 'order' = Start-Stack sequence. 'in_stack' false = on-demand only. 'action' true = fire-and-forget (not tracked as a running app).
title: SOC Master Widget

apps.name: On-Demand Tool
apps.note: fire-and-forget control signal - not part of Start Stack
